title: Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform Finance Operations with Workday
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Metro Bank and Workday to modernize Metro Bank's finance operations. Infosys and Workday will support Metro Bank's transition from legacy systems to a unified, cloud-native platform by implementing Workday Financial Management, Workday Accounting Center, Workday Spend Management, and Workday Prism Analytics. The stated business impact includes streamlining business processes, centralizing financial data, automating key functions, enabling agile decision-making, supporting future growth, accelerating financial closing and reporting, and strengthening governance and risk management through enhanced controls and audit trails. No deal value, contract duration, or financial impact for Infosys was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced a strategic collaboration with Metro Bank an independent UK bank, and Workday (NASDAQ: WDAY), the AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, to modernize Metro Bank's finance operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event, parties involved, and purpose of the collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: By implementing a suite of Workday solutions, including Workday Financial Management, Workday Accounting Center, Workday Spend Management, and Workday Prism Analytics Infosys will support Metro Bank to streamline business processes, centralize financial data, and automate key functions.
important_text_spans.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the implemented solutions and stated operational benefits.

important_text_spans.text: This modernization will allow for agile decision-making and support the bank's future growth, while accelerating financial closing and reporting.
